subcodes.first_line: O Zayn! Thy Lord verily grieveth for His loved ones who have been martyred in His path - a martyrdom the like of which no eye hath ever witnessed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا زین ان ربک یرثی لاحبائه الذین استشهدوا فی سبیله بشهاده مارات شبهها عین
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
